perItemFindings.label: lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl
perItemFindings.one_line: The plan rebuilds a Bernoulli KL band bound after only searching Stat/Minimax, but Causalean already provides `Causalean.Mathlib.Analysis.bernoulli_kl_le_four_sq_sub_of_mem_quarter_band` and `Causalean.Mathlib.Probability.bernoulliLaw_klDiv_le_four_sq_sub`; the node only needs an affine {-B,B} mean-channel wrapper.

verbatim_critique: Re-plan `lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl` to reuse the existing Causalean Bernoulli KL band theorem rather than proving the scalar KL inequality from scratch. A thin local wrapper may still be needed to translate p=(1+u/B)/2 and q=(1+v/B)/2 and push the {0,1} Bernoulli law to {-B,B}, but the substantive KL estimate should be recorded as reuse of `bernoulliLaw_klDiv_le_four_sq_sub` / `bernoulli_kl_le_four_sq_sub_of_mem_quarter_band`. The other define-local and deferred decisions checked are sound partial-fit/bypass choices.
